title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 529.080 - Costs, how adjudged
text:
529.080.  Costs, how adjudged. — In case judgment shall be given for the person making the return to the writ, he shall recover his costs of suit, to be levied by execution as in other cases.
(RSMo 1939 § 1703) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1539; 1919 § 1989; 1909 § 2553
